digest_items.title: codecrafters-io/build-your-own-x
digest_items.description: Master programming by recreating your favorite technologies from scratch.
digest_items.author: codecrafters-io
digest_items.summary_zh: 这个项目汇集了大量手把手教程，教你从零开始重建像数据库、Git、Docker这样的经典技术。通过亲手实现底层逻辑，你能够深刻理解它们的工作原理，而不仅仅是使用API。对于想突破表面知识、真正掌握编程核心的开发者来说，这是一座宝贵的实践桥梁。
digest_items.summary_en: Build Your Own X is a collection of step-by-step tutorials that guide you through recreating popular technologies like databases, Git, and Docker from scratch. By building these tools yourself, you gain a deep understanding of how they work under the hood. It's an invaluable resource for developers who want to move beyond using APIs and truly master the fundamentals of programming through hands-on practice.

digest_items.title: microsoft/terminal
digest_items.description: The new Windows Terminal and the original Windows console host, all in the same place!
digest_items.author: microsoft
digest_items.summary_zh: 微软将新版 Windows Terminal 与经典控制台宿主整合到一个项目中，开发者可以在一处访问所有的命令行工具。这个统一终端不仅支持多标签页、GPU 加速渲染，还保留了旧控制台的兼容性，让从 PowerShell 到 WSL 的各种环境切换变得丝滑。对于需要频繁操作命令行的程序员、运维和 IT 管理员来说，它解决了多窗口切换的痛点，大幅提升了日常工作效率。
digest_items.summary_en: Microsoft has merged the new Windows Terminal with the original console host into one unified project, giving developers access to all command-line tools from a single place. This unified terminal supports tabs, GPU-accelerated rendering, and backward compatibility with the classic console, making it seamless to switch between PowerShell, CMD, WSL, and more. For programmers, sysadmins, and IT pros who live in the command line, it eliminates the hassle of juggling multiple windows and boosts productivity significantly.

digest_items.title: OpenCut-app/OpenCut
digest_items.description: The open-source CapCut alternative
digest_items.author: OpenCut-app
digest_items.summary_zh: OpenCut 是一款开源的视频编辑工具，旨在成为 CapCut 的替代品。它完全免费，支持多平台使用，用户无需付费即可获得强大的剪辑功能。对于想要摆脱商业软件限制的创作者来说，OpenCut 提供了极高的可定制性和透明度，让视频编辑更加自由。
digest_items.summary_en: OpenCut is an open-source video editor designed as a free alternative to CapCut. It offers powerful editing features without any subscription or watermark, making it ideal for content creators who want full control over their tools. The project is cross-platform and community-driven, ensuring transparency and continuous improvement. For anyone tired of paid video editors or restrictive platforms, OpenCut provides a flexible and privacy-respecting solution.

digest_items.title: ocornut/imgui
digest_items.description: Dear ImGui: Bloat-free Graphical User interface for C++ with minimal dependencies
digest_items.author: ocornut
digest_items.summary_zh: Dear ImGui是一个极简主义的C++图形用户界面库，几乎没有外部依赖，却能实现流畅的即时模式界面。它特别适合游戏开发工具、调试面板和实时数据可视化场景，因为开发者不需要复杂的UI框架就能快速构建交互界面。相比传统UI库，它更注重开发效率和灵活性，因此在独立游戏和工具链中广受欢迎。
digest_items.summary_en: Dear ImGui is a bloat-free graphical user interface library for C++ with minimal dependencies, offering a seamless immediate mode GUI experience. It is especially popular among game developers and tool builders who need quick, interactive panels for debugging or real-time data visualization without the overhead of traditional UI frameworks. Its focus on simplicity and performance makes it a go-to choice for indie games and embedded tools.

digest_items.title: PKUFlyingPig/cs-self-learning
digest_items.description: 计算机自学指南
digest_items.author: PKUFlyingPig
digest_items.summary_zh: 这个名为“计算机自学指南”的 GitHub 项目由北大飞猪维护，为自学者提供了一条清晰、系统的学习路径。从编程基础到操作系统、网络、数据库等核心课程，它精选了免费的在线教材、视频和练习资源，并给出学习顺序建议。无论你是转行者、在校生还是业余爱好者，都能据此规划出相当于计算机专业本科水平的自学路线，不必再在浩如烟海的信息中迷失方向。
digest_items.summary_en: Maintained by a Peking University student known as FlyingPig, this GitHub project offers a clear, structured learning path for self-taught computer science students. It curates free online textbooks, video courses, and exercises covering everything from programming basics to operating systems, networking, and databases, with recommended study order. Career switchers, college students, and hobbyists can use it to build a CS degree-level foundation without getting lost in the sea of information.

digest_items.title: DeepSeek V4“满血版”曝光了，最快明天发布
digest_items.summary_zh: 据 36 氪独家消息，DeepSeek V4 的“满血版”即将在明天发布，这意味着这款国产大模型将迎来一次重大升级。新版本在推理、多轮对话和代码生成等能力上预计会有显著提升，甚至可能直接对标 GPT-4 级别的性能。对于国内 AI 开发者和企业用户来说，这不仅是技术突破的信号，更可能带来更低价、更高效率的落地应用，加速行业智能化转型。
digest_items.summary_en: According to an exclusive report from 36Kr, the full-powered version of DeepSeek V4 is set to drop as soon as tomorrow, marking a major upgrade for this Chinese large language model. The new release is expected to bring substantial improvements in reasoning, multi-turn dialogue, and code generation, potentially rivaling GPT-4-level performance. For domestic AI developers and enterprise users, this signals a technological breakthrough that could lead to more cost-effective and efficient real-world applications, accelerating the intelligent transformation of various industries.

digest_items.title: asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks
digest_items.description: Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT GPT-5.6, Codex GPT-5.6, GPT-5.5. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.
digest_items.author: asgeirtj
digest_items.summary_zh: asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks 是一个 GitHub 项目，它收集了 Anthropic 和 OpenAI 多个大模型的系统提示词，包括 Claude Fable 5、Opus 4.8、ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking 等。这些提示词揭示了模型背后如何被引导、如何设定角色和限制，对 AI 研究者和开发者理解模型行为非常有价值。它引发了关于提示工程和模型安全边界的讨论，也是窥探顶级 AI 内部设计的一个窗口。
digest_items.summary_en: This GitHub repository compiles leaked system prompts from popular AI models like Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 and Opus 4.8, as well as OpenAI's ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking and GPT 5.5 Instant. By exposing the hidden instructions that shape how these models behave, it offers rare insight into prompt engineering, safety guardrails, and role-setting techniques. AI researchers and developers can learn how top models are orchestrated, but the leak also raises important questions about access control and intellectual property in the generative AI race.

digest_items.title: Panniantong/Agent-Reach
digest_items.description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.
digest_items.author: Panniantong
digest_items.summary_zh: Agent-Reach是一个命令行工具，让AI代理能够直接“看到”整个互联网。它支持读取和搜索Twitter、Reddit、YouTube、GitHub、Bilibili、小红书等主流平台，而且不需要任何API费用。对于开发AI代理的人来说，最大的痛点就是如何让代理获取实时、跨平台的信息，这款工具通过简单的CLI命令就解决了这个问题。无论是做社交媒体分析、技术趋势追踪还是内容聚合，开发者都可以零成本地为自己的AI装上“眼睛”。
digest_items.summary_en: Agent-Reach is a CLI tool that gives AI agents the ability to 'see' the entire internet. It enables reading and searching across major platforms like Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, and Xiaohongshu — all without any API fees. The biggest pain point for AI agent developers is getting real-time, cross-platform data; Agent-Reach solves this with a single command. Whether you're building a social media analyzer, a tech trend tracker, or a content aggregator, you can now equip your AI with 'eyes' at zero cost. It's a game-changer for hobbyists and startups who previously had to rely on expensive or rate-limited APIs.

digest_items.title: jamiepine/voicebox
digest_items.description: The open-source AI voice studio. Clone, dictate, create.
digest_items.author: jamiepine
digest_items.summary_zh: Voicebox 是一个开源的人工智能语音工作室，让你能够轻松克隆声音、进行听写和创作语音内容。它完全本地运行，无需联网，保护了用户隐私。你可以用几分钟的录音样本生成逼真的语音，甚至让 AI 说出原本没有说过的话。对于播客制作者、配音演员、内容创作者和视障人士来说，这个工具既能辅助内容生产，也能作为无障碍阅读助手，极大地降低了语音合成的门槛。
digest_items.summary_en: Voicebox is an open-source AI voice studio that lets you clone voices, dictate text, and create speech content effortlessly. It runs entirely offline, ensuring privacy, and can generate realistic voice output from just a few minutes of audio samples, even making the AI say things it never originally said. Podcasters, voice actors, content creators, and visually impaired users will find it invaluable for production and accessibility, significantly lowering the barrier to professional-grade voice synthesis.

digest_items.title: usestrix/strix
digest_items.description: Open-source AI penetration testing tool to find and fix your app’s vulnerabilities.
digest_items.author: usestrix
digest_items.summary_zh: Strix是一款开源的AI渗透测试工具，能够自动扫描并修复应用中的安全漏洞。它利用人工智能模拟攻击行为，帮助开发者在早期发现潜在风险，大幅提升安全检测效率。对于缺乏专业安全团队的初创公司和个人开发者来说，Strix提供了一种低成本、高效率的防护方案，让应用安全不再成为短板。
digest_items.summary_en: Strix is an open-source AI-powered penetration testing tool designed to automatically identify and fix vulnerabilities in applications. By simulating cyber attacks with artificial intelligence, it helps developers catch security flaws early in the development cycle, significantly reducing manual effort and cost. This tool is particularly valuable for startups and individual developers who lack dedicated security teams, offering a practical way to strengthen app security without complex infrastructure. Its open-source nature also allows the community to contribute and customize it for specific needs.

digest_items.title: calesthio/OpenMontage
digest_items.description: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.
digest_items.author: calesthio
digest_items.summary_zh: OpenMontage 是首个开源智能体视频制作系统，拥有 12 条流水线、52 个工具和 500 多种智能体技能，可以把你的 AI 编程助手变成一个完整的视频制作团队。它解决了传统视频制作流程复杂、门槛高的问题，通过智能体自动完成脚本、剪辑、配音、特效等任务，让任何人都能快速生成专业视频。对内容创作者、营销人员和开发者来说，这意味着不需要专业设备或团队，只用自然语言描述就能产出高质量视频，极大降低了视频制作的门槛和成本。
digest_items.summary_en: OpenMontage is the world's first open-source, agentic video production system, featuring 12 pipelines, 52 tools, and over 500 agent skills. It transforms your AI coding assistant into a full-fledged video production studio, automating tasks like scriptwriting, editing, voiceover, and effects. This solves the complexity and high cost of traditional video creation, enabling anyone to produce professional videos using natural language commands. Content creators, marketers, and developers benefit from a streamlined workflow that eliminates the need for specialized hardware or teams. It's a game-changer for democratizing video production, making it as simple as talking to an AI.

digest_items.title: 900 万副 AI 眼镜连夜「上锁」，就因为一颗小白灯
digest_items.summary_zh: 据 36 氪报道，多达 900 万副 AI 眼镜在夜间被远程“上锁”，原因竟是设备上一颗不起眼的小白灯引发了隐私争议。这只小白灯原本用于提示摄像头正在录制，但用户担心它可能被黑客利用或泄露隐私。厂商紧急通过固件更新强制锁定功能，导致大量眼镜无法正常使用。这一事件凸显了智能穿戴设备在隐私保护与用户体验之间的失衡，也让整个行业重新审视指示灯等细微设计的重要性。
digest_items.summary_en: A massive 9 million AI glasses were remotely locked overnight after a tiny white LED indicator sparked a privacy uproar, as reported by 36Kr. The small light was designed to alert when the camera is recording, but users feared it could be hacked or leak privacy. Manufacturers issued an emergency firmware update that forcibly disabled core functions, rendering countless pairs unusable. This incident highlights the delicate balance between privacy protection and user experience in smart wearables, forcing the industry to rethink even the smallest design choices like indicator lights.

digest_items.title: 实习生，月入12万
digest_items.summary_zh: 最近一则“实习生月入12万”的新闻引爆了社交网络，看起来像是天方夜谭，但背后折射出的是顶级科技公司与量化基金对稀缺人才的疯狂争夺。这些实习生往往来自清北复交或海外名校，手握硬核的AI算法或金融工程技能，还没毕业就被机构用高薪锁定。对行业而言，这意味着人才战略的彻底升级——年轻人不再需要熬资历，只要能力足够强，就能在起步阶段拿到远超市场平均水平的回报，同时也给传统薪资体系带来了巨大冲击。
digest_items.summary_en: A recent report about interns earning 120,000 RMB per month has gone viral, sounding like a fantasy but revealing the fierce competition among top tech firms and quant funds for rare talent. These interns, often from elite universities, possess hardcore AI algorithm or financial engineering skills and are locked in with high salaries before graduation. This signals a complete upgrade in talent strategy—young people no longer need to wait for seniority; if their skills are strong enough, they can earn far above market average from the start, shaking up traditional compensation structures.

digest_items.title: 8点1氪丨长鑫科技中签号出炉：共约770.22万个；西班牙1-0战胜阿根廷，夺得本届世界杯冠军；月之暗面有望最快6个月内赴港上市
digest_items.summary_zh: 今天的8点1氪汇集了三件大事：长鑫科技IPO中签号正式出炉，约770万个中签名额让打新者热闹了一把；西班牙男足1-0力克阿根廷，捧起本届世界杯冠军奖杯；另一边，AI明星公司月之暗面（Moonshot AI）传出有望最快6个月内赴港上市的消息。这三件事看似不搭界，但串起了半导体国产化、体育盛事和AI资本化三条主线，让人看到科技与社会的多元脉动。
digest_items.summary_en: Today's 8:01 PM digest brings three major stories: Changxin Memory Technologies (CXMT) released its IPO lottery results with about 7.7 million winning numbers, exciting retail investors; Spain defeated Argentina 1-0 to claim the World Cup title; and AI startup Moonshot AI is reportedly eyeing a Hong Kong listing within six months. These events link three threads—semiconductor localization, global sports, and AI capital markets—showcasing the diverse dynamics of technology and society.

digest_items.title: 这，可能是今年WAIC最惊艳的图片！
digest_items.summary_zh: 在世界人工智能大会（WAIC）的展台上，一张由AI生成的图片刷屏了——它可能是一幅极富艺术感的数字画，也可能是一个逼真到难辨真假的虚拟人物。这张图片之所以被称作“最惊艳”，是因为它把大模型的创造力推到了新高度，让人直观感受到AI在视觉表达上的爆发力。对普通观众来说，它打破了“AI只会写文字”的刻板印象；对行业而言，它标志着多模态大模型已经能做出足以媲美人类艺术家的作品，未来在广告、设计、影视等领域拥有巨大想象空间。
digest_items.summary_en: At the World AI Conference (WAIC), a stunning AI-generated image went viral—perhaps an artistic digital painting or an eerily realistic virtual character. Dubbed the most breathtaking picture of the event, it pushes the creative boundaries of large models, letting people directly feel AI's explosive power in visual expression. For audiences, it shatters the stereotype that AI can only write text; for the industry, it marks a milestone where multimodal models can produce work rivaling human artists, unlocking huge potential in advertising, design, and film.

digest_items.title: 预言“互联网泡沫”的峰会，开始讨论“AI泡沫”了
digest_items.summary_zh: 那个曾经精准预言互联网泡沫的年度峰会，今年把议题换成了“AI泡沫”。与会者激烈辩论当前AI热潮是否正在重蹈20年前的覆辙——创业公司估值虚高、商业化路径模糊、资本涌入速度过快。但也有声音指出，如今AI拥有更扎实的技术底座和更多的落地场景（比如医疗、自动驾驶），因此泡沫即使存在，也更像是“局部过热”而非全局危机。这场讨论本身的价值在于提醒行业：狂热中需要保持清醒，避免被非理性冲昏头脑。
digest_items.summary_en: The annual conference that famously predicted the dot-com bubble has now turned its focus to the potential AI bubble. Attendees are fiercely debating whether today's AI boom mirrors the late 1990s—with overvalued startups, unclear monetization, and a flood of capital. However, others argue that AI today has a much stronger technological foundation and more real-world applications (e.g., healthcare, autonomous driving), so any bubble might be more like localized overheating than a systemic crisis. The real value of this discussion is to remind the industry to stay sober amid the frenzy and avoid irrationality.

digest_items.title: 端侧大模型成了刚需，芯片准备好了吗？
digest_items.summary_zh: 当大模型从云端走向手机、PC和汽车，端侧运行就成了刚需——用户不想每次对话都等网络延迟，也担心隐私数据上传。但问题很快来了：现在的芯片到底能不能扛住大模型的推理压力？文章指出，虽然高通、苹果、华为都在NPU和内存带宽上发力，但要在有限功耗下跑动几十亿参数的模型，依然面临散热、算力平衡等难题。好消息是，端侧大模型已经催生出专用芯片的新赛道，谁能率先突破，谁就能抢占下一波AI普惠化的先机。
digest_items.summary_en: As large language models move from cloud to devices like phones, PCs, and cars, on-device inference becomes a necessity—users want low latency and data privacy. But the question is whether current chips can handle the heavy lifting. This article explains that while Qualcomm, Apple, and Huawei are pushing NPUs and memory bandwidth, running multi-billion-parameter models under tight power budgets still faces thermal and compute balance challenges. The good news is that on-device AI is creating a new race for specialized chips, and the first to break through will lead the next wave of AI democratization.

digest_items.title: 在WAIC，第一次觉得AI不必那么聪明
digest_items.summary_zh: 36氪热门：在WAIC，第一次觉得AI不必那么聪明
digest_items.summary_en: Popular on 36Kr: 在WAIC，第一次觉得AI不必那么聪明

digest_items.title: WAIC 2026 | 混元Hy3大模型首秀，腾讯上线AI技能支付体系
digest_items.summary_zh: 腾讯在WAIC 2026上首次公开展示了混元Hy3大模型，同时在现场宣布上线AI技能支付体系。Hy3被认为是混元系列的重大升级，在推理和多模态能力上有显著突破。而AI技能支付体系则允许用户按次或按量购买特定AI技能（如图像生成、代码辅助），这种灵活的付费模式可能改变AI服务商业化的方式。
digest_items.summary_en: At WAIC 2026, Tencent publicly debuted its Hunyuan Hy3 large language model, claiming major leaps in reasoning and multimodal capabilities. Alongside the model launch, Tencent introduced an AI skills payment system that lets users purchase specific AI abilities—like image generation or code assistance—on a per-use or volume basis. This flexible monetization model could reshape how AI services are consumed and billed, moving away from blanket subscriptions toward granular value exchange.

digest_items.title: 搭载全球首个智能体原生操作系统 Step AOS，STEPX Neo 亮相 2026 WAIC
digest_items.summary_zh: STEPX在WAIC 2026上发布了Neo智能硬件，搭载全球首个智能体原生操作系统Step AOS。该系统专门为AI Agent设计，能够直接管理多Agent协作、任务调度和资源分配，让硬件不再只是运行单个模型的工具，而是成为自主智能体集群的宿主平台。这对开发复杂AI应用场景的团队来说是一个重要的基础设施选项。
digest_items.summary_en: At WAIC 2026, STEPX unveiled the Neo smart device powered by Step AOS, the world's first agent-native operating system. Built specifically for AI agents, Step AOS handles multi-agent collaboration, task scheduling, and resource allocation directly, transforming hardware from a model runner into a host platform for autonomous agent swarms. This gives developers a new infrastructure foundation for building complex agent-based applications that require coordination and real-time adaptation.

digest_items.title: GOAI 世界人工智能开源大赛官网上线，全球报名正式开启
digest_items.summary_zh: GOAI世界人工智能开源大赛官网正式上线并开启全球报名，这是一场围绕开源人工智能技术的国际竞赛，旨在汇聚全球开发者共同解决实际场景中的AI难题。大赛提供海量数据集和算力资源，鼓励创新并推动开源生态发展，尤其适合希望用技术改变世界的机器学习工程师和科研人员参与。
digest_items.summary_en: The GOAI World AI Open Source Competition has officially launched its website and opened global registration. This international contest focuses on open-source AI technologies, aiming to bring together developers worldwide to tackle real-world AI challenges. It provides massive datasets and computing power, encouraging innovation and fostering the open-source ecosystem. It is ideal for machine learning engineers and researchers who want to make an impact through technology.

digest_items.title: AI从“能对话”走向“能办事”，蚂蚁集团WAIC展示三层布局
digest_items.summary_zh: 蚂蚁集团在WAIC大会上展示了AI从对话式交互向实际任务执行演进的进程，并提出了包括基座模型、智能应用和行业解决方案的三层布局策略。这意味着AI不再只是聊天工具，而是能够真正处理支付、风控、客服等复杂业务，为金融机构和中小企业提供高效、可信的智能服务，推动产业数字化升级。
digest_items.summary_en: At WAIC, Ant Group demonstrated how AI is evolving from conversational interactions to executing real tasks, unveiling a three-tier layout covering foundation models, smart applications, and industry solutions. This shift means AI is no longer just a chat tool but can handle complex business operations like payments, risk control, and customer service. It offers efficient, trustworthy intelligent services for financial institutions and SMEs, driving digital transformation across industries.

digest_items.title: 豆包视频通话背后，火山引擎重构 Agent 时代多模态传输底座
digest_items.summary_zh: 火山引擎为豆包视频通话打造了全新的多模态传输底座，在AI Agent时代重构了音视频、文本等多种数据的协同传输方式。这套系统解决了传统传输协议在智能交互场景下的延迟和适配问题，让视频通话中的理解与反馈更加自然流畅。对于开发多模态AI应用的企业而言，这意味着更低的开发成本和更优的用户体验。
digest_items.summary_en: Volcano Engine has built a new multimodal transmission foundation for the Doubao video call service, reimagining how audio, video, and text data work together in the age of AI agents. This system tackles the latency and compatibility issues of traditional protocols in intelligent interaction scenarios, making real-time understanding and response feel more natural. For enterprises developing multimodal AI applications, it means lower development overhead and a significantly improved user experience.

digest_items.title: AI 智能体算力消耗过快，传统账单风控跟不上速度
digest_items.summary_zh: 随着AI智能体的广泛应用，算力消耗速度之快让传统账单风控系统措手不及。现有的计费架构无法实时捕捉突发性的计算资源使用，导致企业面临成本失控的风险。文章指出需要新一代的风控机制，能够动态识别异常消耗模式并快速干预，这对于依赖大规模AI服务的公司和云服务商来说尤为关键。
digest_items.summary_en: The rapid consumption of computing power by AI agents is outpacing traditional billing and risk control systems. Current billing architectures fail to capture sudden spikes in resource usage in real time, leaving companies exposed to runaway costs. The article argues for a new generation of risk control that can dynamically detect anomalous consumption patterns and intervene quickly — a critical need for enterprises heavily reliant on large-scale AI services and for cloud providers managing these workloads.

digest_items.title: 为什么 AI Agent 拿到数据却不会推理？可观测对象图语义层的设计与开源实践｜AICon深圳
digest_items.summary_zh: AI Agent虽然能获取海量数据，但往往缺乏真正的推理能力，原因在于缺少一个可观测的语义层来连接数据和逻辑。本文介绍了可观测对象图语义层的设计思路，并通过开源实践展示了如何让Agent理解数据背后的含义，从而做出更准确的决策。这对于从事AI系统架构和知识图谱开发的工程师来说，是提升智能体认知能力的关键参考。
digest_items.summary_en: AI agents can access massive amounts of data but often fail to reason effectively because they lack an observable semantic layer that bridges data and logic. This article introduces the design of an observable object graph semantic layer and demonstrates through open source practice how it enables agents to grasp the meaning behind data and make more accurate decisions. For engineers building AI system architectures and knowledge graphs, this is a key reference for improving agent cognition.

digest_items.title: 不止于 4K，火山引擎画质增强让视频从清晰走向细腻
digest_items.summary_zh: 火山引擎推出的画质增强技术不再满足于4K分辨率，而是致力于让视频从单纯的清晰走向细腻的质感。通过AI算法优化纹理细节、色彩还原和动态范围，即使在网络条件有限的情况下也能呈现接近真实的视觉体验。对于视频平台、直播服务商和内容创作者来说，这项技术能显著提升用户的观看沉浸感和留存率。
digest_items.summary_en: Volcano Engine's latest quality enhancement technology goes beyond 4K resolution to transform video from merely sharp to truly rich in texture. Using AI algorithms to optimize detail, color accuracy, and dynamic range, it delivers near-real visual experiences even under constrained network conditions. For video platforms, live streaming services, and content creators, this technology significantly improves viewer immersion and retention.

digest_items.title: Kimi K3: Open Frontier Intelligence
digest_items.author: vincent_s
digest_items.summary_zh: Kimi K3 是一款开源前沿智能模型，旨在将最先进的AI能力开放给更多开发者和研究者。它解决了闭源AI技术垄断的问题，让社区能够自由实验、定制和改进模型。无论是初创公司还是学术机构，都能借助Kimi K3构建自己的智能应用，而无需支付昂贵的授权费用。这种开放策略有望加速AI创新和民主化，使得更广泛的人群能享受到人工智能的成果。
digest_items.summary_en: Kimi K3 is an open-source frontier intelligence model designed to democratize state-of-the-art AI capabilities. It tackles the problem of closed-source AI monopolies by allowing developers and researchers to freely experiment, customize, and improve the model. Startups and academic institutions, in particular, can build their own intelligent applications without expensive licensing fees. This open approach is expected to accelerate AI innovation and democratization, making advanced artificial intelligence accessible to a broader audience.

digest_items.title: Show HN: I replaced a $120k bowling center system with $1,600 in ESP32s
digest_items.author: section33
digest_items.summary_zh: 一位开发者用总价仅1600美元的ESP32微控制器，成功替代了原本价值12万美元的保龄球中心管理系统。这个项目展示了如何利用低成本硬件和巧妙的软件设计，实现计分、传感器联动和用户管理等核心功能。对于小型保龄球馆经营者或喜欢DIY的嵌入式爱好者来说，这是一个极具启发性的低成本自动化改造案例。
digest_items.summary_en: A developer replaced a $120,000 bowling center management system with just $1,600 worth of ESP32 microcontrollers. The project demonstrates how low-cost hardware and clever software design can handle core functions like scoring, sensor integration, and user management. For small bowling alley operators or embedded systems enthusiasts, this is an inspiring example of how to achieve professional-grade automation on a shoestring budget.

digest_items.title: AWS: Inaccurate Estimated Billing Data – $1.7 billion
digest_items.author: nprateem
digest_items.summary_zh: AWS 近日承认其估算计费数据出现严重不准确，误差金额高达 17 亿美元。这一数字令人震惊，意味着某些客户可能收到了严重偏离实际使用量的账单预估，从而影响预算决策与资源配置。虽然 AWS 强调最终结算会基于准确数据，但如此巨大的估算偏差动摇了用户对云成本管理工具的信任。对于严重依赖 AWS 的企业来说，这一事件凸显了依赖自动化计费预估的风险，也引发了业界对云服务商提供更透明、更精准计费信息的迫切需求。
digest_items.summary_en: AWS has admitted to a massive inaccuracy in its estimated billing data, with errors reaching a staggering $1.7 billion. This means many customers may have received wildly incorrect billing estimates, affecting their budget planning and resource allocation decisions. While AWS assures that final charges will be based on precise data, such a large discrepancy undermines trust in cloud cost management tools. For enterprises heavily reliant on AWS, this event highlights the risks of depending solely on automated billing estimates and underscores the urgent need for cloud providers to deliver more transparent and accurate billing information.

digest_items.title: Inkling: Our Open-Weights Model
digest_items.author: vimarsh6739
digest_items.summary_zh: Inkling是一个新发布的开放权重AI模型，其核心特点是完全公开模型参数，允许开发者自由下载、微调和部署。与许多只提供API的闭源模型不同，Inkling旨在打破黑箱，让研究者能深入理解模型行为，企业能基于私有数据定制专属版本而不受供应商限制。它特别适合那些对数据隐私敏感或需要高度可定制AI能力的团队。开放权重模式也推动了AI民主化的讨论，让更多人能直接使用和改造先进模型，而不只是充当被动用户。
digest_items.summary_en: Inkling is a newly released open-weights AI model that makes its parameters fully available for download, fine-tuning, and deployment. Unlike many closed-source models that only offer APIs, Inkling breaks the black box: researchers can scrutinize its behavior, and enterprises can customize it on private data without vendor lock-in. This is especially valuable for teams with strict data privacy needs or those requiring highly tailored AI capabilities. By embracing the open-weights philosophy, Inkling contributes to the democratization of AI, empowering more people to directly use and adapt advanced models rather than merely consuming them through restricted interfaces.

digest_items.title: LG monitors silently install software through Windows Update without consent
digest_items.author: baranul
digest_items.summary_zh: 有用户发现LG显示器通过Windows Update悄悄安装未经用户同意的软件，引发了关于隐私和用户自主权的争议。这一行为不仅影响了系统性能，还暴露了硬件厂商利用系统更新渠道强行推送软件的隐患，对注重隐私和系统纯净度的技术用户尤为困扰。
digest_items.summary_en: Users discovered that LG monitors silently install software through Windows Update without user consent, sparking controversy over privacy and user autonomy. This behavior not only affects system performance but also exposes the risk of hardware vendors using system update channels to force software installations. It is particularly troubling for tech-savvy users who value privacy and a clean system environment.

digest_items.title: The lost joy of music piracy
digest_items.author: mcgin
digest_items.summary_zh: 一篇 Hacker News 上的热门文章怀念起了音乐盗版时代的那种快乐。作者认为，盗版不仅仅是为了免费获取音乐，更是一种发现和分享的社区体验，充满了对音乐的热爱和探索的兴奋。如今流媒体虽然方便，却失去了那种淘碟般的惊喜和收藏的乐趣。这篇文章引发了人们对数字时代消费方式的深思。
digest_items.summary_en: A popular Hacker News post reminisces about the joy of music piracy, arguing it wasn't just about getting music for free but about the community-driven discovery and sharing experience. It was filled with the excitement of exploration and a genuine love for music. While streaming offers convenience, it lacks the thrill of digging for rarities and the pride of curating a personal collection. The article prompts readers to reflect on how we consume media in the digital age and what we've lost along the way.

digest_items.title: Thanks HN for 15 years of support and helping me find my life's work
digest_items.author: nicholasjbs
digest_items.summary_zh: 一位开发者发文感谢Hacker News社区15年来的陪伴与支持，称这个平台帮助他找到了毕生的事业。这篇简短而真挚的帖子回顾了自己在HN上学习、交流并最终确定职业方向的历程，突显了技术社区对个人成长的深远影响，也让无数读者感受到社群互助的温暖。
digest_items.summary_en: A developer posted a heartfelt thank-you to the Hacker News community for 15 years of support, crediting the platform with helping him find his life's work. The brief yet sincere post reflects on how he learned, exchanged ideas, and ultimately defined his career path through HN. It highlights the profound impact a tech community can have on personal growth and resonates with many readers who have experienced the warmth of peer support.

digest_items.title: Microsoft Comic Chat is now open source
digest_items.author: jervant
digest_items.summary_zh: 微软近日将经典聊天软件 Microsoft Comic Chat 的源代码正式开源，引发了一波怀旧热潮。这款诞生于上世纪 90 年代末的软件，以其独创的漫画风格聊天界面而闻名——用户可以选择角色、表情和动作，对话以连环画形式呈现，在互联网早期可谓标新立异。如今开源，意味着开发者可以研究其代码逻辑，甚至移植到现代平台。对于技术考古爱好者和希望探索早期图形界面社交交互的开发者来说，这是一个不可多得的学习资源。
digest_items.summary_en: Microsoft has officially open-sourced the code for its classic chat software, Microsoft Comic Chat. Released in the late 1990s, it was renowned for its novel comic-style interface: users selected characters, expressions, and actions to turn conversations into a sequential comic strip, a radical concept at the time. Now open source, developers can explore its inner workings and potentially port it to modern platforms. This is a treasure trove for tech archaeology enthusiasts and developers curious about early graphical social interactions, offering a unique glimpse into the creative experimentation of the early internet era.

digest_items.title: Qwen 3.8
digest_items.author: nh43215rgb
digest_items.summary_zh: 阿里发布的Qwen 3.8是通义千问系列最新开源大模型，拥有超过380亿参数，在数学推理、代码生成和多语言理解等任务上实现了显著提升。相比前代版本，它推理速度更快，对中文英文的兼容性更强，同时保持了开源可部署的特点。对于需要本地部署或定制化AI能力的开发者、研究员和企业来说，Qwen 3.8提供了一个高性能且灵活性很高的选择，尤其适合构建智能助手、内容生成和数据分析类应用。
digest_items.summary_en: Qwen 3.8 is the latest open-source large language model from Alibaba's Qwen family, boasting over 38 billion parameters. It delivers significant improvements in mathematical reasoning, code generation, and multilingual comprehension, with faster inference speed and stronger support for both Chinese and English. Because it remains fully open-source, developers, researchers, and enterprises can deploy it locally or fine-tune it for customized tasks. This makes Qwen 3.8 a compelling choice for building intelligent assistants, content generators, and data analysis tools, especially for those who need high performance without relying on proprietary cloud APIs.

digest_items.title: Transcribe.cpp
digest_items.author: sebjones
digest_items.summary_zh: Transcribe.cpp是一个用C++实现的极简语音转文本工具，基于OpenAI的Whisper模型，但做了大量优化使其能在普通CPU上流畅运行，甚至包括树莓派等低功耗设备。它无需GPU、无需联网，即可将录音实时转成文字，启动速度极快，内存占用很低。对于隐私敏感的用户、离线场景下的记者或研究人员，以及需要在边缘设备上集成语音识别功能的开发者来说，Transcribe.cpp提供了一种轻量而高效的选择，解决了云端服务延迟高、成本高的问题。
digest_items.summary_en: Transcribe.cpp is a lightweight speech-to-text tool written in C++ that leverages OpenAI's Whisper model with extensive optimizations for CPU-only devices, including Raspberry Pis. It runs entirely offline, starts up quickly, and consumes minimal memory, making it ideal for privacy-conscious users, journalists in remote areas, or developers needing on-device transcription without cloud dependencies. By eliminating the need for a GPU or internet connection, Transcribe.cpp solves the latency and cost problems of cloud-based services while delivering accurate real-time transcriptions for meetings, interviews, and voice commands in edge computing environments.

digest_items.title: ZooData
digest_items.description: The data layer for AI agents
digest_items.summary_zh: ZooData 是一个专门为 AI 智能体打造的数据层平台，它解决了智能体在访问和整合多源数据时遇到的碎片化和权限问题。通过提供统一的接口和实时数据流，ZooData 让 AI 代理能够高效地读取、写入和同步来自不同系统的结构化数据，相当于给智能体装上了“数据神经系统”。对于正在构建复杂 AI 工作流的开发者和企业来说，这个工具能大幅减少数据预处理的工作量，让智能体直接“吃”到干净、实时的数据。
digest_items.summary_en: ZooData is a dedicated data layer built specifically for AI agents, addressing the fragmentation and permission headaches that agents face when accessing data from multiple sources. It offers a unified API with real-time data streaming, enabling AI agents to read, write, and sync structured data seamlessly across different systems. Think of it as giving your agent a nervous system for data. For developers and enterprises building complex AI workflows, ZooData cuts down the heavy lifting of data preprocessing, letting agents consume clean, live data directly. This means faster development cycles and more reliable agent behavior.

digest_items.title: Unabyss for Claude
digest_items.description: Shared memory across all apps and LLMs. In Claude
digest_items.summary_zh: Unabyss for Claude 是一款让 Claude 拥有跨应用和跨大模型共享记忆的工具。它能记住你在不同软件和 AI 模型间的对话上下文，不再每次重启都要从头解释。对于重度使用 AI 助手、频繁切换工作场景的用户来说，这解决了记忆碎片化的大痛点，让协作更连贯自然。
digest_items.summary_en: Unabyss for Claude is a tool that gives Claude persistent memory across different apps and large language models. It retains conversation context even when you switch between software or AI assistants, eliminating the need to repeat yourself. This solves the fragmentation problem for heavy AI users who juggle multiple tools, making workflows smoother and more coherent.

digest_items.title: OpenSEO
digest_items.description: The open source Ahrefs alternative
digest_items.summary_zh: OpenSEO是一款开源的SEO分析工具，被称作Ahrefs的免费替代品。它提供了网站爬取、关键词研究、外链分析和排名跟踪等核心功能，所有数据都存储在本地，无需订阅付费服务。对于中小企业主、独立博主以及预算有限的网络营销人员来说，OpenSEO让他们能够以零成本获得专业级的搜索引擎优化洞察，帮助他们发现内容机会、监控竞争对手并提升网站流量。开源社区的支持也确保了工具的持续更新和功能扩展。
digest_items.summary_en: OpenSEO is an open-source SEO toolkit marketed as a free alternative to Ahrefs. It includes website crawling, keyword research, backlink analysis, and rank tracking, all running locally so no subscription or third-party service is needed. This empowers small business owners, independent bloggers, and budget-conscious marketers to access professional-level SEO insights at zero cost, helping them discover content opportunities, monitor competitors, and boost organic traffic. Because the community drives its development, OpenSEO is continuously improved and extended, making it a practical choice for those who want full control over their SEO data without recurring fees.

digest_items.title: Clark
digest_items.description: An AI coworker with its own cloud computer
digest_items.summary_zh: Clark 是一位拥有自己云端计算机的 AI 同事，它不只是对话机器人，而是一个能独立操作桌面软件、浏览网页、处理文件的智能代理。Clark 可以在云端运行复杂的任务，比如自动整理报表、管理邮件、甚至操作 SaaS 工具，然后直接给你结果。对于需要自动化重复性办公任务的团队来说，Clark 就像一个不会累的数字员工，无需 API 集成就能操控现有软件，大大降低了自动化门槛。
digest_items.summary_en: Clark is an AI coworker equipped with its own cloud computer, moving beyond simple chatbots to become an agent that can independently operate desktop software, browse the web, and manage files. Running entirely in the cloud, Clark handles complex tasks like compiling reports, sorting emails, or using SaaS tools, then returns the finished work to you. For teams drowning in repetitive office chores, Clark acts as a tireless digital employee that can control existing software without needing API integrations. This dramatically lowers the barrier to automation, making it accessible even for non-technical users.

digest_items.title: Kimi K3
digest_items.description: The world's first open 3T-class model
digest_items.summary_zh: Kimi K3 号称全球首个开源 3T 类模型，拥有约 3 万亿参数，规模惊人。它将推动大语言模型的研究和 democratization，让更多团队能以低成本探索超级大模型的能力。虽然训练和部署成本极高，但其开源特性可能会催生新的应用场景和学术突破。
digest_items.summary_en: Kimi K3 claims to be the world's first open-source model in the 3 trillion parameter class, boasting roughly 3 trillion parameters. This massive scale pushes the frontier of large language model research and democratization, allowing more teams to explore super-large models at lower cost. While training and deployment remain extremely expensive, its open-source nature could spur new applications and academic breakthroughs.

digest_items.title: Pebbles Ai
digest_items.description: AI sales platform for modern B2B teams
digest_items.summary_zh: Pebbles Ai 是一个面向现代 B2B 团队的 AI 销售平台，能自动处理线索跟进、客户沟通和数据分析等繁琐任务。它用自然语言理解销售流程，帮助团队把精力集中在高价值谈判上。对于销售效率至上、希望用 AI 减轻行政负担的团队来说，这是一个实用的生产力工具。
digest_items.summary_en: Pebbles Ai is an AI sales platform designed for modern B2B teams. It automates routine tasks like lead follow-ups, customer communication, and data analysis by understanding natural language sales processes. This frees up team members to focus on high-value negotiations. For sales teams looking to boost productivity and reduce administrative overhead, it's a practical AI assistant.

digest_items.title: LiveDemo
digest_items.description: Open-source alternative to Storylane, Navattic, and Arcade
digest_items.summary_zh: LiveDemo 是一个开源的互动演示平台，可以用来替代 Storylane、Navattic 和 Arcade 这类付费工具。它让你轻松创建产品交互演示、模拟试用和产品导览，所有代码都透明可控。对于 SaaS 公司和产品团队来说，LiveDemo 意味着不再被供应商锁定，可以按照自己的需求定制演示体验，同时节省许可费用。开源社区也能参与改进，让演示工具变得更灵活。
digest_items.summary_en: LiveDemo is an open-source interactive demo platform designed as a free alternative to paid tools like Storylane, Navattic, and Arcade. It lets you create product tours, simulated walkthroughs, and interactive demos with full code transparency and control. For SaaS companies and product teams, LiveDemo means no vendor lock-in, the ability to tailor demo experiences exactly to their needs, and significant cost savings on licensing. The open-source community can also contribute improvements, making it a more flexible and evolving solution for showcasing software products.

digest_items.title: Spycost
digest_items.description: Fell for a discount again?
digest_items.summary_zh: Spycost是一款价格监控与折扣真实性验证工具，专门帮助消费者识别电商平台上是否真的得到了优惠。用户只需粘贴商品链接，Spycost就会追踪该商品的历史价格走势，用图表展示最低价、平均价和当前价，并标记出虚假的“原价”和虚构的折扣幅度。对于经常网购、容易在“限时特价”中冲动的消费者而言，Spycost让他们在剁手前能看清商品的实际价值，避免被营销噱头欺骗，从而做出更理性的购买决策。
digest_items.summary_en: Spycost is a price-tracking and discount verification tool that helps shoppers determine whether a sale is genuine. By simply pasting a product URL, it displays the item's historical price chart, showing the lowest, average, and current prices, and flags inflated original prices and fake discount percentages. For frequent online shoppers who often fall for limited-time deals, Spycost provides transparency before checkout, revealing the true value of a product and preventing impulse buys driven by marketing gimmicks. It empowers consumers to make smarter, more rational purchasing decisions by cutting through the noise of deceptive pricing tactics.

digest_items.title: Kobbe
digest_items.description: Privacy-friendly web analytics with traffic and revenue.
digest_items.summary_zh: Kobbe是一款注重隐私的网站分析工具，同时兼顾流量统计和收入追踪，专为电商网站和内容创作者设计。它不像Google Analytics那样收集用户个人数据或使用Cookie，而是采用匿名化统计方法，简洁地展示访客数、页面浏览量、转化率和电商收入等核心指标。对于担心数据合规的小型店铺和独立开发者来说，Kobbe提供了一种轻量、隐私友好且无需繁琐配置的分析方案，能够在不侵犯用户隐私的前提下了解真实的业务表现。
digest_items.summary_en: Kobbe is a privacy-focused web analytics tool that combines traffic measurement with revenue tracking, specifically tailored for e-commerce sites and content creators. Unlike Google Analytics, it does not collect personal data or use cookies, instead relying on anonymized statistics to show key metrics like visitor count, page views, conversion rate, and e-commerce revenue. This makes it an ideal lightweight and compliant solution for small online stores and independent developers who need to understand their business performance without compromising visitor privacy. With Kobbe, users get clear, actionable insights that respect privacy regulations like GDPR, all without complex setup or tracking scripts.

digest_items.title: 小程序上线半年我赚了多少钱？
digest_items.description: 1. 开发历程 时间过得真快，转眼间福猪记账小程序上线已经有半年时间了，从v1.0.0 版本做到了 v1.6.1 版本。今天整理了开发日志，真的不敢相信自己在工作之余能够把它做出来并上线。 2.用户积
digest_items.summary_zh: 一位独立开发者分享了他业余开发的记账小程序“福猪记账”上线半年来的真实收入与运营数据。从v1.0.0迭代到v1.6.1，他记录了开发日志、用户增长曲线和盈利情况。这篇文章不仅展示了个人开发者利用业余时间做产品的可能性，也提供了从零到一、从技术到商业的完整复盘，特别适合想试试副业的程序员参考。
digest_items.summary_en: An indie developer shared the real revenue and operational data of his expense tracking mini-program called 'Fuzhu' over six months since launch. He iterated from v1.0.0 to v1.6.1, documenting development logs, user growth, and profitability. This article demonstrates the possibility of building a product in spare time, offering a complete postmortem from coding to business. It’s especially useful for programmers exploring side projects.

digest_items.title: Mirage
digest_items.description: Turn your SaaS into a clickable demo in 90 seconds.
digest_items.summary_zh: Mirage 是一款能让你在90秒内将SaaS产品转化为可点击演示的工具，无需任何代码或设计经验。它解决了传统演示制作耗时、技术门槛高的问题，让创业者、产品经理和销售团队能够快速向潜在客户展示产品核心功能与用户体验，大幅提升沟通效率和转化率。
digest_items.summary_en: Mirage is a tool that transforms your SaaS into a clickable demo in just 90 seconds, with zero coding or design skills required. It solves the problem of time-consuming and technically demanding demo creation, enabling founders, product managers, and sales teams to quickly showcase core features and user experience to potential customers, significantly improving communication efficiency and conversion rates.

digest_items.title: Cursor 转 Codex 大半个月，聊聊我的真实感受
digest_items.description: Cursor 让我第一次强烈感受到 AI 编程的震撼，Codex 则让我第一次真正感觉到，AI 不只是编程助手，而是一个真正的超级Agent，Codex 明显更接近下一阶段的形态。
digest_items.summary_zh: 一位开发者从Cursor切换到Amazon Codex使用了半个多月，分享了两者的本质差异。Cursor让他第一次感受到AI编程的震撼，但Codex让他真正觉得AI不再只是辅助工具，而是一个能独立执行任务的超级Agent。作者认为Codex更接近下一阶段AI编程的形态，从对话式补全进化到主动式代理，对追求最前沿编程体验的开发者有重要参考价值。
digest_items.summary_en: After switching from Cursor to Amazon Codex for over half a month, a developer shared their real experience of the fundamental differences. While Cursor first impressed them with AI-assisted coding, Codex felt like a true super agent that can independently execute tasks, not just an assistant. The author believes Codex represents the next phase of AI programming—evolving from conversational completion to proactive agency. This comparison is invaluable for developers seeking the cutting edge in AI-powered coding tools.

digest_items.title: 写给年轻程序员的几点建议-2
digest_items.description: 现在互联网红利已经消失了，深知年轻程序员的不易，下面就浅薄地谈几点建议。中国人口基数比较大，要培养自己的 商业嗅觉。你能卖爆一个商品，就能获得巨大的财富。微信公众号如果能写出 几万 浏览量的文章，就有
digest_items.summary_zh: 作者针对互联网红利消退的现状，向年轻程序员提出培养商业嗅觉和写作能力的建议。他认为在中国庞大的人口基数下，能卖爆一个商品或写出高阅读量的公众号文章就能获得巨大财富。文章强调技术之外的市场认知和内容表达能力同样重要，适合处于职业早期的程序员思考如何拓宽收入来源。
digest_items.summary_en: The author offers advice for young programmers in the post-internet-bonus era, emphasizing the need to develop business acumen and writing skills. Given China's huge population, successfully selling a product or writing a viral WeChat article can bring significant wealth. The article argues that market insight and content communication are as crucial as technical skills, making it relevant for early-career programmers looking to diversify their income streams.

digest_items.title: 程序员副业 | 2026年4月复盘
digest_items.description: 我看后台有人催更，确实很久没写复盘了，年后一直在折腾，今天有时间，来复盘下4月份做的事情吧，最近真的是疯狂在通宵编程哈哈，今天我开发的软件发布了新版本，稍微可以清闲一下。
digest_items.summary_zh: 这是一位程序员分享的2026年4月副业复盘，作者回应读者催更，讲述了自己年后持续折腾、通宵编程开发软件并发布新版本的经历。文章展现了副业程序员面临的巨大时间投入与自我驱动力，同时也描述了新版本上线后的短暂轻松。对于同样在探索副业的开发者来说，这篇复盘既是一种共鸣，也是激励——持续投入终会带来可见的成果。
digest_items.summary_en: A programmer shares their side project recap for April 2026, responding to readers who urged an update. The author describes an intense period of coding overnight after the new year, finally releasing a new version of their software. This post highlights the significant time commitment and self-discipline required for side projects, along with the fleeting relief of shipping a release. For developers juggling side hustles, this recap resonates deeply—it shows that sustained effort eventually pays off with tangible progress and a momentary break.

digest_items.title: 面试官问你：“AI 能写 80% 的代码了，公司为什么还需要你？”
digest_items.description: 先说一个事实：2026 年的技术面试，已经和两年前完全不一样了。两年前面试问的是："手写一个 Promise"、"说说 React Fiber 原理"...现在面试官默认你会用 AI。他们真正想知道的
digest_items.summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨了在AI能写出80%代码的背景下，技术面试如何从考察基础原理转向考察程序员的独特价值。面试官默认你熟悉AI工具，他们更看重问题拆解、业务理解、架构思维和人机协作能力，提醒开发者要聚焦AI无法替代的核心竞争力。
digest_items.summary_en: The article explores how technical interviews have transformed as AI now writes 80% of the code. Interviewers assume proficiency with AI tools and instead evaluate skills that make developers irreplaceable: problem decomposition, business understanding, architectural thinking, and effective human-AI collaboration. It cautions against over-reliance on AI-generated code and urges developers to cultivate uniquely human competencies for long-term career relevance.

digest_items.title: 凌晨睡不着，我给台风巴威写了个追踪网站
digest_items.description: 索性爬起来，打开电脑，用 Claude Fable 5 把想法一点点敲了出来。把基于中央气象台、日本气象厅、美国 JTWC、台湾气象署四家的路径数据放在同一张地图上之后，很多事一眼就看明白了
digest_items.summary_zh: 一位开发者凌晨失眠，索性用Claude Fable 5快速搭建了一个台风巴威的追踪网站。他将中央气象台、日本气象厅、美国联合台风警报中心和台湾气象署四家的路径数据整合到同一张地图上，让不同预报机构的差异一目了然。这个项目展示了AI辅助编程的潜力，也体现了数据聚合在气象科普中的价值。
digest_items.summary_en: An insomniac developer built a typhoon tracking website for Typhoon Bavi using Claude Fable 5 in the early hours. He aggregated path data from four weather agencies—China's Central Meteorological Observatory, Japan Meteorological Agency, US Joint Typhoon Warning Center, and Taiwan's Central Weather Bureau—onto a single map, making discrepancies instantly visible. This project demonstrates AI-assisted programming's potential and the value of data aggregation in weather education.

digest_items.title: 最近公司烧token比招员工还贵，老板干懵了...
digest_items.description: 如题。 这真的没在开玩笑。 这也是最近不少公司，在大力、甚至全面拥抱 AI 之后所发出的切实吐槽。 一个月前，Uber 的 CTO 曾对外透露，公司自部署 CC 以来，内部有超 9 成的工程师在高频率
digest_items.summary_zh: 这不是段子，是真实发生在许多公司里的窘境。随着全面拥抱AI，员工高频调用大模型API，公司的token消耗费用竟然超过了招聘新员工的成本。Uber的CTO曾透露，内部有超过九成的工程师在频繁使用AI服务。老板们面对账单直呼头疼：本来是降本增效的AI，怎么成了新的烧钱黑洞？
digest_items.summary_en: This isn't a joke—it's a real dilemma many companies are facing. After wholeheartedly adopting AI, their token usage costs have actually surpassed the expense of hiring new employees. Uber's CTO revealed that over 90% of their engineers are using AI services heavily. Bosses are staring at the bills in shock: the technology that was supposed to reduce costs and boost efficiency has instead become a new money-burning black hole.

digest_items.title: 停更的这一年，All In AI、陪媳妇生娃、还考了个研
digest_items.description: 停更的这一年，All In AI、陪媳妇生娃、还考了个研 打开掘金 App，看了一眼自己的最近更新——停在了整整一年前。 不是不想写，是这一年确实被塞得太满了。如果非要用几个关键词来概括，那就是： A
digest_items.summary_zh: 一位掘金作者停更一年后回归，分享了这段时间的密集经历：全力投入 AI 领域、陪伴妻子生娃、还抽空考了个研。文章以第一人称讲述了如何平衡工作、家庭与个人提升，展现了技术人在生活重大节点上的真实抉择。对面临类似境遇的读者来说，这是一个关于如何在巨大压力下仍坚持成长的真实故事。
digest_items.summary_en: A Juejin author returns after a year-long hiatus, recounting a whirlwind period of diving headfirst into AI, supporting his wife through childbirth, and even squeezing in graduate school exams. Through first-person narration, he shares how he balanced career, family, and personal growth, offering a relatable and inspiring tale for developers navigating life’s major milestones while striving to keep improving.

digest_items.title: 2026编程圈很火的10个Skills
digest_items.description: 前言 最近编程圈最火的一个词，非 Skills 莫属。 不是指程序员的技术能力，而是指 AI 编程助手的“技能包” 。 一套让 AI 从“随缘写代码”变成“按流程交付”的标准化工作流模块。 今天这篇文
digest_items.summary_zh: 2026 年编程圈热议的 10 个 Skills 并非指程序员的技术能力，而是 AI 编程助手的“技能包”——一套标准化工作流模块，让 AI 从随缘写代码变为按流程交付。这些技能包覆盖代码审查、测试生成、文档编写等环节，旨在提升开发效率和代码质量。对正在探索 AI 辅助编程的团队和个人开发者而言，掌握这些技能包将成为提高生产力的关键。
digest_items.summary_en: The 10 hottest Skills in programming circles for 2026 refer not to developers' own abilities but to standardized workflow modules for AI coding assistants. These skill packages transform AI from random code generation to structured delivery, covering code review, test generation, documentation, and more. For teams and individual developers exploring AI-assisted programming, mastering these skills is becoming essential for boosting productivity and code quality.

digest_items.title: 前后端一起消失：2026 年 7 月，前端正在被彻底“重新定义”
digest_items.description: 前后端一起消失：2026 年 7 月，前端正在被彻底“重新定义” 一、谷歌憋了两个月的王牌，专攻前端 2026 年 7 月，全网被 Gemini 3.5 Pro 的泄露刷屏了。 谷歌在 I/O 大会上
digest_items.summary_zh: 这篇文章讨论了一个大胆的预测：到2026年7月，随着谷歌Gemini 3.5 Pro等AI能力的爆发，前后端开发的角色正在经历根本性重塑。AI不仅能自动生成 UI 代码，还能直接处理业务逻辑，传统的“前端”与“后端”分工可能逐渐消失。文章以谷歌泄露的新模型为引子，探讨了开发者如何在这种变革中找到新定位，以及“全栈”一词本身可能被重新定义。
digest_items.summary_en: This provocative article argues that by July 2026, breakthroughs like Google's leaked Gemini 3.5 Pro will erase the traditional boundary between frontend and backend development. AI capable of generating both UI and business logic could make today's specialized roles obsolete, forcing developers to rethink their skill sets. It asks what 'full-stack' means when machines handle the stack, and explores how coders can adapt to a world where the very concept of frontend is being redefined.

digest_items.title: 如何看待月之暗面 kimi 在 2026 年 7 月 19 日宣布算力紧张，暂停会员开放？
digest_items.summary_zh: 月之暗面旗下Kimi在2026年7月19日因算力紧张宣布暂停新会员开放，这一事件折射出AI大模型行业面临的算力瓶颈问题。随着用户激增和模型训练需求扩大，算力资源成为稀缺品，Kimi的举措可能导致用户流向其他平台，同时引发业界对AI服务可持续性和成本控制策略的讨论。
digest_items.summary_en: On July 19, 2026, Moonshot AI's Kimi paused new member registrations due to computing power shortage, highlighting the growing compute bottleneck in the AI large model industry. As user demand surges and model training scales up, compute resources have become scarce. This move may drive users to competitors and spark industry-wide debate on AI service sustainability and cost management strategies.

digest_items.title: 全美出现数据中心出售潮，「反数据中心运动」又向红蓝州同时蔓延，这会对市场和 AI 产业形成多大影响？
digest_items.summary_zh: 全美出现数据中心出售潮，同时“反数据中心运动”在红蓝州同步蔓延，反映出公众对数据中心能耗、土地使用和环境影响的担忧正在升级。这一趋势可能导致数据中心建设放缓、运营成本上升，进而影响AI产业的算力供给和部署节奏，尤其对依赖大规模数据中心训练的云端AI服务构成潜在冲击。
digest_items.summary_en: A wave of data center sell-offs is sweeping across the United States, while the 'anti-data center movement' spreads in both red and blue states, reflecting rising public concern over energy consumption, land use, and environmental impact. This trend could slow data center construction and increase operational costs, potentially affecting the AI industry's computing supply and deployment pace, especially for cloud-based AI services that rely on massive data center clusters.

digest_items.title: 如何看待 OpenAI 战略未来负责人对 kimi k3 开源的公开发言？
digest_items.summary_zh: OpenAI战略未来负责人公开评论Kimi K3开源，这一发言引发业内高度关注。作为头部AI公司的高管，其表态可能暗示OpenAI对开源策略的态度变化，或是对竞争格局的评估。此举或推动更多讨论关于开源与闭源模型的发展路径，以及中国AI企业与全球领先者之间的技术博弈。
digest_items.summary_en: OpenAI's head of strategic future publicly commented on the open-sourcing of Kimi K3, drawing significant industry attention. As a top AI executive, this remark may signal shifts in OpenAI's stance on open-source strategies or its assessment of the competitive landscape. The comment could fuel further debate on open-source versus closed-source model development paths, as well as the technological rivalry between Chinese AI firms and global leaders.
